items.name: Multi-strategy-registration-algorithm
items.description: This method addresses the problems in heterogeneous point cloud registration such as uneven density, size differences, and deformation distortion, which are difficult to be solved by traditional rigid body methods. It proposes a multi-strategy iterative optimization registration framework based on posterior feedback.
